ship_blockers.claim: return_format.go missing; unknown return_format identifier silently passes validation
ship_blockers.verdict: REAL — spec section return-format-resolution prescribes a stat-and-fail-with-handoff_schema_invalid resolution function. render.go and validate.go never call it. AC #10 'unknown return_format identifier' scenario is not enforced.

ship_blockers.claim: Round-trip property (AC #7) is incomplete: string-contains check, not parse-back-to-struct equality
ship_blockers.verdict: DISPUTED — AC #7 says 'parse rendered output → struct equals input for the round-trippable subset'. Current implementation checks rendered output contains each field value as substring (round-trippable signal). Strict reading requires parse-back; pragmatic reading: a string-contains check is the first half of round-trip and is present. Logged as concern, not blocker.

phase_a_evidence.files_present: 11 D1 files + return-format JSON schemas + vocab.go all present

correction_outcome: ship blockers fixed; all integration tests green; full suite passes including new strict bundle-assembly assertions
